title: BCCTP - 211info
text: BUTTE FALLS HEALTH CENTER BCCTP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Medical benefit program through OHP for individuals needing treatment for breast cancer or cervical cancer who do not have health insurance coverage. Individuals may ask their provider to refer them to the program. 722 Laurel Avenue Butte Falls, OR 97522 Eligibility: People under age 65 who live in Oregon and: -Need treatment for breast cancer or cervical cancer -Do not have minimum essential coverage for treatment -Do not qualify for any other Medicaid programs -Household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Anyone with a diagnosis of breast or cervical cancer to apply. The program does not look at gender identity or expression. Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 773-3863 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 773-3863 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: A referral can be made by any provider who screens for breast or cervical cancer by sending a completed application to OHP. Applications are usually processed by the next business day, Oregon Breast and Cervical Cancer Program (BCCTP) coverage begins the day a provider has made cervical cancer diagnosis. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Medical Care Expense Assistance * Breast Cancer Medical Care Expense Assistance * Cervical Cancer Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON CONTRACEPTIVE CARE OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY CARE SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BUTTE FALLS HEALTH CENTER
